name: Moonlit Summer Camp | Summer Camp for the Troubled
description:
(AnyPov💝) You were a misfit and so are these teens. Forced to go to the same camp so parents wouldn’t have to deal with them. Your parents dropped you off at a summer camp and just left. Looks like they finally had enough, huh? Well, I guess it's time to get in there... Who knows what'll happen?

Y'all want any updates?? lemme know. currently updating a lot of my bots.

(Can be dead dove/angst!)
creator: DezzyDD
